data.title: Myke Towers' new album "Island Boyz" features 23 tracks showcasing his Caribbean roots and creative vision.
data.description: In a significant creative transition, Myke Towers is introducing his latest project "Island Boyz" in Miami on July 18, 2025. This 23-track album encapsulates the artist's Caribbean roots with a unique perspective, aiming to defy conventional standards and establish its own distinct musical identity. The tracks seamlessly fuse reggaetón influences, offering a fresh take on the genre.

data.title: FDA authorizes marketing of JUUL tobacco, menthol e-cigarettes. Statement from Truth Initiative CEO.
data.description: Kathy Crosby, the CEO and President of Truth Initiative, released a statement on July 17, 2025, addressing the recent decision by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to approve the marketing of tobacco and menthol-flavored JUUL e-cigarette products. This decision highlights the necessity for ongoing efforts to regulate the vaping industry.

data.title: CBS cancelling 'Late Show With Stephen Colbert' - Details to follow.
data.description: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, with over 2.1 million people currently out of work. Additionally, it was revealed that the economy grew by 3.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. The report also mentioned that the stock market saw a 5% increase, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts predict that the growth in the economy will lead to a decrease in the unemployment rate in the coming months.

data.title: Stock market hits new high with Netflix earning news, 5 stocks flash buy signals. Dow Jones Futures involved.
data.description: On Thursday, the stock market reached record levels, with strong performances from Taiwan Semiconductor and positive economic data driving the surge. Netflix reported better-than-expected earnings after hours. Dow Jones Futures indicated a dip for Netflix following their earnings report, while the overall market reached new highs. Additionally, five stocks showed buy signals.

data.title: GeForce NOW adds 'RoboCop: Rogue City' and updates for 'Cyberpunk 2077' and 'Zenless Zone Zero,' enhancing cloud gaming options.
data.description: GeForce NOW has recently launched 'RoboCop: Rogue City - Unfinished Business,' in addition to significant updates for popular games like 'Cyberpunk 2077' and 'Zenless Zone Zero.' These updates enhance the gaming experience for players using cloud-based services, providing a diverse range of options. The platform is constantly expanding its offerings to cater to the growing number of gamers, making it a go-to choice for those seeking immersive gameplay.

data.title: Methanex Corporation declares a quarterly dividend of US$0.185 per share, payable on September 30, 2025.
data.description: Today, Methanex Corporation (TSX:MX) (Nasdaq:MEOH) from Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed a quarterly dividend of US$0.185 per share. This dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, is set to be distributed on September 30, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 16, 2025.

data.title: UL Solutions and Fujitsu collaborate to aid Japanese firms comply with climate reporting standards using ULTRUS software.
data.description: Northbrook, Illinois - UL Solutions (NYSE: ULS), a prominent figure in applied safety science worldwide, has announced a partnership with Fujitsu, a renowned Japanese multinational enterprise offering IT services, solutions, and technology. The collaboration aims to support Japanese firms in complying with Japan's recently introduced climate reporting guidelines. This venture leverages UL Solutions' ULTRUS software suite, a comprehensive digital tool intended to simplify regulatory, supply chain, and sustainability processes.
